records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-226 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) said, “I married off my daughter (the Blessed Lady) Fatima only by God’s order.”
records.arabicText: 226 - وَبِهذَا الإِسناد قالَ: قالَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏ صَلَّى اللهُعَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: ما زَوَّجتُ فاطِمَةَ إِلاّ لِما أَمَرَنِي اللَّه بِتَزويجِها.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-226 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “I married off my daughter (the Blessed Lady) Fatima only by God’s order.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-227 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) said, “Whoever I am the Master of, Ali is the Master of. O My God! Love whoever loves Ali. Be the enemy of whoever is Ali’s enemy. Help whoever helps him. Belittle whoever belittles him. Belittle his enemies. Make him and his progeny sufficient. Make their ending a good one. Bless whatever you grant them. Assist them through the Holy Spirit. Protect them wherever they go on the Earth. Establish the position of Divine Leadership among them. Grant a good reward to whoever obeys them and destroy whoever opposes them. Indeed You are the Near, the Fulfiller.”
records.arabicText: 227 - وَبِهذَا الإِسناد قالَ: قالَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏ صَلَّى اللهُعَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: مَن كُنْت مَوْلاهُ فَعَلِىٌّ مَوْلاهُ اَللَّهُمَّ والَ مَن والاهُ، وَعادَ مَن عاداهُ، وَأَعِنْ مَن أَعانَهُ، وَانصُر مَن نَصَرَهُ، وَاخْذُلْ مَنْ خَذَلَهُ، وَاخْذُلْ عَدُوِّه وَكُن لَهُ وَلِوُلْدِه، وَاخلُفهُ فِيهِمْ بِخَيرٍ، وَبارَكْ لَهُم فِيما تُعطيهِم، وَأَيَّدهُم بِرُوحُ القُدُس، وَاحفَظهُم حَيْثُ تَوَجَّهُوا مِنَ الأَرْض، وَاجْعَل الإِمامَة فِيهِمْ وَاشكُر مَن أَطاعَهُم وَأَهلِك مَن عَصَاهُم، إِنَّكَ قَريبٌ مُجِيبٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-227 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Whoever I am the Master of, Ali is the Master of. O My God! Love whoever loves Ali. Be the enemy of whoever is Ali’s enemy. Help whoever helps him. Belittle whoever belittles him. Belittle his enemies. Make him and his progeny sufficient. Make their ending a good one. Bless whatever you grant them. Assist them through the Holy Spirit. Protect them wherever they go on the Earth. Establish the position of Divine Leadership among them. Grant a good reward to whoever obeys them and destroy whoever opposes them. Indeed You are the Near, the Fulfiller.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-228 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “Ali (a.s.) was the first man who followed me. He is the first one whom God will encounter (in the Hereafter.”
records.arabicText: 228 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ النَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: عَلِيٌّ أَوَّلُ مَنِ اتَّبَعَني وَهُوَأَوَّل مَن يُصافِحَهُ الحَقِّ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-228 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Ali (a.s.) was the first man who followed me. He is the first one whom God will encounter (in the Hereafter.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-229 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “O Ali! You will take over my responsibilities. You are my Representative over my nation after me.”
records.arabicText: 229 - وَبِهذَا الإسناد قالَ: قالَ النَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: يا عَلِيُّ أَنْتَ تَبرَاُ ذَمَّتي، وَأَنْتَ خَلِيفَتِي عَلَى اُمَّتي.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-230 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “The Hour will not come unless the Rightful Riser from us will rise. That is when God grants him permission to do so. Whoever follows him will be saved, but whoever opposes him will be destroyed. O servants of God! Remember God! Go towards him even if he is on snow or ice as he is the Representative of the Honorable the Exalted God on Earth.”
records.arabicText: 230 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ النَّبِيّ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: لا تَقُومُ السَّاعَة حَتّى‏ يَقُومُ قائِمٌ لِلْحَقِّ مِنَّا، وَذلِكَ حِينَ يَأذَنُ اللَّه عَزَّ وَجَلَّ لَهُ، وَمَن تَبِعَهُ نَجا، وَمَن تَخَلَّفَ عَنْهُ هَلَكَ، اللَّه اللَّه عِبادَ اللَّهِ فَأَتُوهُ وَلَوْ عَلَى الثَّلجِ، فَإِنَّهُ خَلِيفَةُ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ وَخَلِيفَتِي.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-230 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “The Hour will not come unless the Rightful Riser from us will rise. That is when God grants him permission to do so. Whoever follows him will be saved, but whoever opposes him will be destroyed. O servants of God! Remember God! Go towards him even if he is on snow or ice as he is the Representative of the Honorable the Exalted God on Earth.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-231 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) was holding Ali’s (a.s.) hand and said, “Whoever claims that he loves me but does not love Ali (a.s.) is a liar.”
records.arabicText: 231 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ وَهُوَآخِذٌ بِيَدِ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ: مَن زَعَمَ أَنَّهُ يُحِبُّني وَلا يُحِبُّ هذا فَقَدْ كَذَبَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-231 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) was holding Ali’s (a.s.) hand and said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Whoever claims that he loves me but does not love Ali (a.s.) is a liar.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-232 According to the same documentation, God’s Prophet (S) said, “Pulpits will be set up on the Resurrection Day around the Throne for my followers and the followers of the members of my Household - those who are sincerely our friends. The Honorable the Exalted God will say,“O My servants! Rush to me so that I can bestow upon you My Nobility as you experienced much harm in the world.”
records.arabicText: 232 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: تُوضَعُ يَوْمَ القِيامَةِ مَنابِرُ حَولَ العَرْشِ لِشِيعَتِي وَشِيعَة أَهْل بَيْتِي الُمخْـلصِين فِي وِلايَتِنا، وَيَقُولُ اللَّه عَزَّ وَجَلَّ: هَلُمُّوا يـاعِبادي إِلَىَّ لانشِرَ عَلَيْكُمْ كَرامَتي، فَقَدْ أوذِيتُم فِي الدُّنْيا.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-233 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), God’s Prophet (S) said, “O Ali! God created you from the tree of which I am the root, and you are the trunk. Al-Hassan and Al-Husayn are its branches. Those who love us are the leafs. The Honorable the Exalted God will take to Paradise whoever grabs onto any of the branches!”
records.arabicText: 233 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيٍّ قالَ: قالَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّىاللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: خُلِقَت يا عَلِيُّ مِن شَجَرَةٍ خُلِقَت مِنْها، أَنَا أَصلُها وَأَنْتَ فَرعُها وَالحُسَيْن وَالحَسَن أَغصانُها وَمُحِبُّونا وَرَقُها، فَمَنْ تَعَلَّقَ بِشَي‏ءٍ مِنْها أَدخَلَهُ اللَّه عَزَّ وَجَلَّ الجَنَّة.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-233 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), God’s Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “O Ali! God created you from the tree of which I am the root, and you are the trunk. Al-Hassan and Al-Husayn are its branches. Those who love us are the leafs. The Honorable the Exalted God will take to Paradise whoever grabs onto any of the branches!”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-234 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Al-Hassan ibn Ali (a.s.), on the authority of his father (a.s.), God’s Prophet (S) said, “Only those of the Helpers (Ansar) will despise you whose fathers are Jews.”
records.arabicText: 234 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَن الحَسَن بْنِ عَلِى، عَنْأَبِيهِ‏عَليّ‏عَلَيْهِمَا السَّلاَمُ قالَ: قالَ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: لا يَبغِضُكَ مِنَ الأَنْصارِ إِلاّ مَن كانَ أَصلُهُ يَهُودِيّاً.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-234 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Al-Hassan ibn Ali (a.s.), on the authority of his father (a.s.), God’s Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Only those of the Helpers (Ansar) will despise you whose fathers are Jews.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 235 - With his chain of narrators, he said: Ali (as) said: "It is due to the covenant of the Prophet (saw) al-Umi that only a believer loves me, and only a hypocrite hates me."
records.arabicText: 235 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ: إِنَّهُلِعَهَدِ النَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ الأُمِّي إِلَى أَنَّهُ لا يُحِبُّني إِلاّ مُؤْمِنٌ، ولا يُبغِضُني إِلاّ مُنافِقٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 235 - With his chain of narrators, he said: Ali (as) said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: "It is due to the covenant of the Prophet (saw) al-Umi that only a believer loves me, and only a hypocrite hates me."

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-236 According to the same documentation,the Prophet (S) said, “No one is allowed to go through this mosque except for me, Ali (a.s.), (the Blessed Lady) Fatima (a.s.), Al-Hassan (a.s.), Al-Husayn (a.s.) and whoever is a member of my Household since they are from me.”
records.arabicText: 236 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ النَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: لا يَحِلُّ لاحَدٍ يُجنِبُ فِي هذا الْمَسْجِدِ إِلاّ أَنَا وَعَلِيٌّ وَفاطِمَةُ وَالحَسَن وَالحُسَيْنُ وَمَن كانَ مِن أَهْلِي فَإِنَّهُم مِنِّي.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-236 According to the same documentation,the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “No one is allowed to go through this mosque except for me, Ali (a.s.), (the Blessed Lady) Fatima (a.s.), Al-Hassan (a.s.), Al-Husayn (a.s.) and whoever is a member of my Household since they are from me.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-237 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “Should anyone but Ali (a.s.) look at my private parts he would be an atheist.”
records.arabicText: 237 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ النَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: لا يَرى‏ عَوْرَتِي غَيْرِ عَلِيِّ إِلاّ كافِرٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-237 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Should anyone but Ali (a.s.) look at my private parts he would be an atheist.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-238 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “On the Resurrection Day, your followers will come while they are not thirsty. However, your enemies will come while they are terribly thirsty and no one will give them any water.”
records.arabicText: 238 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ قالَ: قالَالنَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: تَرِدُ شِيعَتُكَ يَوْمَ القِيامَةِ رُواءَ غَيرِ عِطاشٍ، وَيَرِدُ عَدُوِّكَ عِطاشاً يَستَسقُونَ فَلا يُسقَونَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-238 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “On the Resurrection Day, your followers will come while they are not thirsty. However, your enemies will come while they are terribly thirsty and no one will give them any water.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-239 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “Animosity with Ali equals atheism and animosity with the Hashemites equals hypocrisy.”
records.arabicText: 239 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ النَّبِيّ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِوَآلِهِ: بُغضُ عَلِيِّ كُفرٌ وَبُغضُ بَنِي هاشِمٍ نِفاقٌ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-240 According to the same documentation, Ali (a.s.) said, “The Prophet (S) prayed for me and said, O my God! expand his breast, strengthen his tongue, and protect him from heat and cold.”
records.arabicText: 240 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ دَعا لي‏النَّبِيُ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ فَقالَ: اَللَّهُمَّ اِهدِ قَلْبَهُ، وَاشْرِح صَدْرَهُ، وَثَبِّت لِسانَهُ وَقِهَ الحَرَّ وَالبَردَ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-240 According to the same documentation, Ali (a.s.) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “The Prophet (S) prayed for me and said, O my God! expand his breast, strengthen his tongue, and protect him from heat and cold.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-241 According to the same documentation, Ali (a.s.) said, “I have been appointed to kill the those who breach their covenants (nakitheen), the hypocrites (qasiteen), and the Kharajites (mariqeen).
records.arabicText: 241 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ قالَ: قالَ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ: أُمِرتُبِقِتالِ النّاكِثينَ وَالقاسِطينَ وَالمارِقِينَ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-242 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “Take refuge in God from the well of sorrow.”
records.arabicText: 242 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ قالَ: قالَالنَّبِيُ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: تَعُوذُوا بِاللَّهِ مِن جُبِّ الحُزنِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-242 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Take refuge in God from the well of sorrow.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-243 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “Only Ali (a.s.) will pay back my debts and only Ali will fulfill my promises.”
records.arabicText: 243 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ قالَ: قالَالنَّبِيُ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: لا يُؤَدِّي عَنِّي إِلاّ عَلِيٌّ، وَلا يَقضِي عَداتِي إِلاّ عَلِيٌّ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-243 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Only Ali (a.s.) will pay back my debts and only Ali will fulfill my promises.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-244 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) told the Hashemites, “After me you will be weak.”
records.arabicText: 244 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ، عَن النَّبِي‏صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: أَنَّهُ قالَ لِبَني هاشِمٍ: أَنْتُمْ المُستَضعَفُونَ بَعْدي.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-244 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) told the Hashemites,

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-245 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “The best wealth and treasure of a man is his charity.”
records.arabicText: 245 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ قالَ: قالَالنَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: خَيْرُ مالِ المَرْءِ وَذَخائِرِه الصَّدَقَة.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-245 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “The best wealth and treasure of a man is his charity.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-246 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “I forgo the alms-tax on horses and slaves.”
records.arabicText: 246 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنِ النَّبِي‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِقالَ: عَفَوتُ لَكُمْ عَنْ صَدَقَةِ الخَيلِ وَالرَّقيقِ.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-247 According to the same documentation, the Prophet (S) said, “Ali is my best brother, and Hamza and Abbas are my best uncles.”
records.arabicText: 247 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنِ النَّبِيُ‏ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِأَنَّهُ قالَ: خَيْرُ إِخْوانِي عَلِيٌّ، وَخَيْرُ أَعْمامِي حَمْزَةُ، وَالعَبَّاسُ صِنُوا أَبي.

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-248 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “Two or more make up a congregational prayer.”
records.arabicText: 248 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ، عَنِ النَّبِي‏صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ قالَ: الإِثنانِ وَما فَوقَهُما جَماعَةٌ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-248 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Two or more make up a congregational prayer.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-249 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “Those who say the call to prayer will be taller than others on the Resurrection Day.”
records.arabicText: 249 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ، عَنِ النَّبِي‏عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ قالَ: المُؤَذَّنُونَ أطُولُ النَّاسِ أَعناقاً يَوْمَ القِيامَةِ.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-249 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
records.thaqalaynMatn: “Those who say the call to prayer will be taller than others on the Resurrection Day.”

records.author: Shaykh Muḥammad b. ʿAlī al-Ṣaduq
records.englishText: 31-250 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said, “A believer sees using God’s light.”
records.arabicText: 250 - وَبِإِسْنادِهِ عَنْ عَلِيِ‏ عَلَيْهِ السَّلامُ، عَنِ النَّبِي‏صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَنَّهُ قالَ: المُؤمِنُ يَنْظُرُ بِنُورِ اللَّه.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 31-250 According to the same documentation, on the authority of Ali (a.s.), the Prophet (S) said,
